sources.title: The White-Haired Girl (白毛女)
sources.description: One of the most well-known feature films from soon after the foundation of the People's Republic of China, based on a Chinese opera by the same name.

metadata.Plot: The story centers on a well-known Chinese folk tale about a girl named Xi'er, the daughter of a poor farmer in Shaanxi province, whose family is persecuted by a brutal landlord.
metadata.Writer: Choui Khoua, Yusheng Liang, Bin Wang
metadata.Actors: Lu Zhao, Shouwei Zhang, Hua Tian
